meaning: n.副本,拷贝,摹仿,一册v.复印,复制,拷贝,抄袭
examples: Can you copy me in on your report?
I sent a copy to the school principal.
They procured us a copy of the report.
Is it possible to get hold of a copy of the last company accounts?
An officer always carries a list of his men and leaves a copy in the truck.
